title: rutaea obtusifolia
intro: Rutaea obtusifolia, also known as the rough-leaved rutaea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions. Rutaea obtusifolia can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
